semantic.role: Utility module for generating deterministic structural fingerprints of source code files.
responsibilities: Normalizes and deduplicates arrays of strings (e.g., import symbols).
Computes a stable SHA-256 hash of a JSON-serializable payload.
Calculates a canonical hash representing the structural footprint of a FileSkeleton object.
Supports semantic short-circuiting by identifying unchanged file structures.
outOfScope: Parsing or analyzing source code syntax (relies on provided FileSkeleton).
Managing or caching fingerprints across runs.
Handling file I/O or reading from disk.
invariants: The generated hash is deterministic for identical structural inputs.
Normalization ensures order and whitespace do not affect the hash.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, content-addressable identifier for file structures to enable efficient change detection and synchronization.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Supports json-only sync mode with semantic short-circuiting, likely used to skip processing of unchanged files by comparing structural hashes.
